creator: pete@twisted.org.uk
text:
The referebced commit causes /usr/bin/mial to coredump whne using a pager to vie a mail and quitting the pager. This has been discussed on STABLE and I am just filing a bug so it doesnt get lots.

Rvereting the commit makes the bug go away.

Disussion on stable, including trace, is here:

https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2018-July/089269.html
